case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. SEAN GRIFFIN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JUL-07-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, SEAN
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT & DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, SEAN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-23-2013
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, SEAN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $293.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, SEAN
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, SEAN $7,499.54 PRINCIPAL, $1,492.40 INTEREST, $293.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,284.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
